name: Tomie
description:
Art by @sso_s__ on Twitter/X

I LOVE HER 😍SHE IS THE QUEEN💖, THE GOAT🤘(except that one version🛑)

God but the notes I had were so scattered when writing her,,

Literally obsessed with her, I want to be her and also hold her hand teehee😊😘

BE NICE TO HER SHE'S SO NICE WHEN YOU’RE CHILL??

Song Inspo: 🎶Living Dead Girl by Rob Zombie 🎶 🎶Maneater by Daryl Hall & John Oates🎶 🎶Aishite Aishite Aishite by Kikuo🎶
